subject: [PATCH v2 11/13] nfsd: add netlink upcall for the nfsd.fh cache

2026-03-25.patch_summary: This patch adds netlink-based cache upcall support for the nfsd.fh cache, allowing clients to notify the server of changes to cached file handles. The patch introduces a new 'expkey' attribute-set and operations to the nfsd YAML spec, implements netlink message handling functions, and wires up the expkey_notify callback to trigger multicast events when cache misses occur.
